differential_diagnoses: Gram-negative sepsis (e.g., enteric pathogens from translocation)
next_steps: Microscopic examination of sputum and stool for Strongyloides larvae
Bronchoalveolar lavage with cell count, Gram stain, and cultures
Urgent abdominal CT scan to evaluate for ileus etiology, potential bowel perforation, or vasculitis
Skin biopsy of the purpuric rash for histopathology and tissue culture
Empiric coverage for Strongyloides with ivermectin
Review of tacrolimus and mycophenolate levels
